# Lexipanda

> Free browser-based image compression, cropping and editing tool.
> No uploads. No account required. Runs entirely in the browser.

## What it does
- Compress images to a target file size in KB or MB
- Crop with interactive drag tool and aspect ratio presets (Free, 1:1, 4:3, 16:9, 3:2, 2:3)
- Resize by exact pixel dimensions or percentage scale
- Convert between JPEG, WebP and PNG formats
- Adjust brightness, contrast, saturation, blur and sharpness
- Apply filters: grayscale, sepia, invert, vintage, cool tone, warm tone
- Rotate clockwise/counter-clockwise, flip horizontal/vertical
- Before and after compare slider to review changes
- Download or copy to clipboard
- All processing happens client-side — images never leave the device

## Who it's for
Developers, designers, bloggers, marketers, social media managers,
and anyone who needs to quickly compress, crop or edit images without
installing software or uploading files to a server.

## Privacy
Lexipanda processes everything in the browser using the Canvas API.
No image data is ever sent to a server. No tracking of image content.

## Free tier
5 conversions per day free. No sign up or account required.
Resets daily at midnight.

## URL
https://www.lexipanda.com

## Alternatives it replaces
TinyPNG, Squoosh, iLovePDF image tools, Canva image resizer,
Adobe Express image resizer, online-convert.com
